description: §55.1 (D-FORM-6) — the inverse of the pattern-on-number case. `min(n)` requires a number cell; applying it to `<label … > = "hi"` (a string-literal-init cell) is a compile-time type error → E-TYPE-031. Length/bound predicates and value/range predicates are not interchangeable across the string/number divide.
rationale: §55.1 predicate-applicability enforcement. `label`'s type is inferred as `string` from its literal initializer `"hi"`; `min` (number-only, catalog `cellTypeRequirement: number`) does not apply → E-TYPE-031. The author most likely wanted `length(>=3)` (the string-appropriate predicate).
